entry.title: FMS not working
entry.content:
Hi

 

I have simple FMS in A/p Invoice.

Select 'GA' from Dummy

 

In one Database it is working fine.

In another one On Change of CardCode GSTTranTyp is not refreshing . If Click second time on Lens then it refreshes.

 

If i change it to On Change Of Vendor Ref No then it works.

 

Auto refresh is set to True.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content:
I am attempting to show/hide UI facets using only ABAP CDS annotations with Fiori Element App Preview from eclipse (ADT). Our S/4 HANA on-premise 2023 system components. 

In the CDS projection view, I create a virtual element. Any boolean type other than 'abap_boolean' gives a deprecrated warning: 'Data Element xfeld is deprecated. Use Data Element ABAP_BOOLEAN instead', so we use abap_boolean. 

@EndUserText.label: 'Hide Section 1'
@UI.hidden: true
virtual hideSection1IsEnabled: abap_boolean,

 

In the metadata extension, we attempt to reference the virtual element but are given error 'Annotation value "hideSection1IsEnabled" must be of type 'Boolean'.@EndUserText.label: 'Hide Section 1' @ui.hidden: true virtual hideSection1IsEnabled: abap_boolean,  

  @UI.facet: [
  {
    parentId: 'Section1',
    id: 'SubSection1',
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: 'Sub Section 1',
    targetQualifier: 'DetailsGroup',
    hidden: 'hideSection1IsEnabled'
  },

__PRESENT

entry.title: Footer must be bottom of every page in reward statement
entry.content:
We have reward statement which contain of 5 pages. We want footer must be bottom of every page.

What will be the best code in XSL. I tried below, but for few employees working fine for few not.

<tr>
<td>
<p><br></br></p>
<p><br></br></p>
<p><br></br></p>
<p><br></br></p>
<p><br></br></p>
<p><br></br></p>
<p style="text-align: center; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 6.5pt; color: #2f5496;">Footer Address</p>
</td>
</tr>

@xavierlegarrec , need your help please.

entry.title: Re: Improving SAP Integration Suite with a sorting mechanism for DataStore entries
entry.content:
Excellent work, Marian! Just one remark: you write "Option 1 would always extract the last entry created". In SAP's documentation I read the following: 

There is no in-order processing of data store entries. In other words, the sequence of data store entries selected with a Select operation is random and non-deterministic. If you have restricted the number of entries to be fetched (with the Number of Polled Messages attribute), the selection of retrieved entries is also random. (https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/define-data-store-select-operations)

Wouldn't that mean that in most times that you do a select, you should theoretically get a different  message than before (random)? That means, I believe there shouldn't be the risk of a blocking situation (I haven't tested it and don't know how it behaves in reality).

However, of course if you need in sequence processing or have more control in general, your approach is perfect. 

Philippe

entry.title: Re: Generate IDOC from SAP BTP CAP app
entry.content:
Please call this 'MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE' from BTP:-

DATA: control TYPE edidc,
      data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF edidd.

control-mestyp = 'ORDERS'.
control-rcvprn = 'RECEIVER'.
control-sndprn = 'SENDER'.

APPEND VALUE #( segnam = 'E1EDK01' sdata = '...' ) TO data.

CALL FUNCTION 'MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE'
  EXPORTING
    master_idoc_control = control
  TABLES
    communication_idoc_control = control
    idoc_data_records = data.

Thanks

entry.title: How to migrate SAP BPC 10.1 to SAC planning & analytic platform
entry.content:
How to migrate SAP BPC 10.1 to SAC planning & analytic platform.

Kindly share the steps in details pls. 

Thank you

Sandy

entry.title: ABAP Dump LIST_TOO_MANY_LPROS:Modify Screen.
entry.content:
Dear ALl,

I am getting dump ABAP Dump LIST_TOO_MANY_LPROS at line MODIFY SCREEN.. 

Code as below:

      LOOP AT SCREEN.
        IF screen-name = '%#AUTOTEXT005'.  "Sdeshpan
          screen-invisible = ' '.  "Visisble NXT
          screen-active = '1'.
          MODIFY SCREEN.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.

Kindly help,

Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to Add Custom Button in BP Application ToolBar
entry.content: Hi Robert-Peter, I have a customer requirement to add a custom button in the BP Application Toolbar, similar to the 'General Data' and 'Company Code' buttons.

entry.title: In-House Cash - Refunds Process
entry.content:
Dear all,

Kindly ask your advice on how Refunds Process can be implemented in the In-House Cash?

The problem: Refunds (returns for payments which haven't reached Vendor) are posted into main IHC account with the Bank Statement. Now, they (ideally) need to be re-posted back to original Subsidiary Company and original Vendor as an open item. Which is now not happening.

Is there any way to setup this with the standard functionality? Which standard process suggest SAP for this case? Only manual process?

Thanks for your advices in advance.

Filip

entry.title: Re: No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX we a...
entry.content:
"Unfortunately the system did not record movement 202 in ERP, because a queue appeared. "

How did you handle this (before trying to create manual corrections)

  • SMQ1 outbound or SMQ2 inbound queue fails with SYSFAIL (EWM)

entry.title: Re: WESLOG XML not picking Material
entry.content:
Solved using method ANALYZE_CHGOBJ_MAT_FULL of class CL_WES_SERV_OUT_MATERIAL.

Added new added DMARC in when condition .

entry.title: Re: Handling File Routing and Alerts in SAP CPI Based on File Type
entry.content:
@harsh__chauhanit is now clear your requirement. Nevertheless, for safety and if it's the file type the relevant criteria, and since anyone can assign any file extention to any file type, then you may consider the use of the Apache Tika .

Apache Tika is a java library that you can use in a Groovy script and will help you to identify file types in a more secure way than by just looking at the file extension. Of course this may not be necessary if you trust the creators of the source files in the SFTP server.

entry.title: Catch weight quantity wrongly getting determined in outbound
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one issue in which the material the Catch weight material but whenever I'm creating and outbound from STO the parallel unit of measure (CW) is getting calculated from material master 1CW = 480 KG but the actual CW quantity in MMBE is 420 KG (Actual HU Qty), previously it was correctly getting picked as per the quantity in MMBE. But now something happened it's calculating from master data and due to this the queues are getting stuck with error "valuation quantity becomes negative" due to less catch weight at S4.

Please suggest what need to be done in this case.

Thanks,

Vinod.

entry.title: Re: Passing Input parameters from analytic dataset to analytic model in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Thanks, it is of great help. I have done step by step as shown in this blog, the input parameter works fine and I can see the prompt in SAC. The issue is I do not see the Value Help, list of values in SAC. What should I be missing.
Regards
Arvind

entry.title: Re: How to consume Payroll data in CDS view ?
entry.content: Same requirement here too. We need the data from 0HR_PY_1_CE in Datasphere but it's not compatible (delta processing is not possible - would need BW bridge I think, which we don't have). Has anyone had any success building a CDS as an alternative?

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content:
Hi,

ADT expects a literal value(true/false), not reference.

To show/hide UI facets dynamically, I think custom logic at UI5 can be done.

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Re: BAS in BTP Trial Account is NOT getting STARTED
entry.content: The issue was resolved on its own after a day. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Functional Area in Asset Accounting - Message no. AAPO189
entry.content: any answer for this query

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: Re: Trip Data Inconsistencies
entry.content:
Hi,

 

According to your screenshot of TE cluster the trip has not been posted so far (RUNID is initial).

Thus just delete the trip and create it again.

 

Regards,

Monika

I have created the destination in SAP BTP destination as follows : 

And I have tried to make a get call over this destination as follows :

I tried many workaround and it does not work . 

 

And samething when I used basic authentification it does not work . 

 

your urgent help is highly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content:
@ui.facet: [{
    parentId: 'Section1',
    id: 'SubSection1',
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: 'Sub Section 1',
    targetQualifier: 'DetailsGroup',
    //hidden: 'hideSection1IsEnabled'
}]

extend via manifest.json(say a details page):-

"sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
  "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details": {
    "controllerName": "<controller_name>"
  }
}

in the actual controller after rendering:-

onAfterRendering: function () {
        var oView = this.getView();
        var oModel = oView.getModel(); // Assuming you use default model
        var oContext = oView.getBindingContext();

        // Read the field `hideSection1IsEnabled`
        var bHideSection = oModel.getProperty("hideSection1IsEnabled", oContext);

        // Get the SmartForm or Section control (adjust ID)
        var oSection = oView.byId("SubSection1"); // Use actual section ID

        if (oSection) {
          oSection.setVisible(!bHideSection); // Hide or show based on logic
        }
      }

entry.title: Re: Access value of badi parameter 'Type Ref to'
entry.content: Hi Dominik, I like to ask one more question please. If parameter "RE_POS_MAN_PROC" would be of type "Exporting". How to address it than? Thanks

entry.title: How to schedule fqm_delete for snapshot cleanup in public cloud system
entry.content:
1. App Delete data from one exposure from operations message log display "Execution is cancelled since regular deletion job is scheduled."
  2. FQM_DELETE log message is displayed on deletion of snapshot in public cloud "Execution is cancelled since regular deletion job is scheduled."
  3. The option to delete redundant snapshot is not available.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to schedule fqm_delete for snapshot cleanup in pu...
entry.content:
The FQM_DELETE program is scheduled as a background job variant SAP&REGU_14 and does not require manual execution for snapshot cleanup. It runs daily in the background, with snapshots configured to be deleted automatically based on the parameter "Number of days back to present = 14 days."

To change the scheduled start time, a request must be submitted via Expert Configuration.

Please find the information given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3593212

entry.title: Re: Internal external candidate
entry.content:
Hi Nimesha,

You can create a custom field in the candidate profile to capture this information. Using Integration Center along with Intelligent Services, you can trigger an integration that automatically updates this custom flag on the candidate profile whenever the candidate status changes.

 

Thanks,
Sanjeet

please review the SAP Help about sales BOM functionality in S/4Hana Public Cloud: Bills of Material in Sales Documents 

You can achieve this by using item category group DISH:

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Platinum Engineering Libraries
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks, Melvin for this blog! I have some open points about the Email sending function.

I use the platinum library to send email but those are with the following limitations

  • Subject with max 50 characters
  • Attachment name max 50 characters
  • At the bottom of the mail, I will always have the text "This mail was sent frommyXXXXXX.businessbydesign.cloud.sap"

May be someone can help me finding any solution on how to extend the number of characters and also how to remove the text.

Or are there any other ways (libraries) to send email from pdi? Without using an external Service?

Many Thanks

Linda

entry.title: Re: CORS and Access-Control-Allow-Origin in SAP Build APP...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please use the relative url like '/destination/EMDEMO/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSRV_EM_ORDERS_BIND' instead of the 'https://<backend>.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSRV_EM_ORDERS_BIND'

CORS blocking due to direct calling of the url.

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content: Hi experts, I need your help please.

entry.title: PP/DS: Forward scheduling doesn’t schedule as early as expected
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I’m testing the forward scheduling function in the PP/DS planning board when adding planned orders manually.

Even though the calendar is empty and forward scheduling is selected,
the system doesn’t place the order at the earliest possible start,
but somewhere later.

I left the start date empty and entered a requirement date,
but it still doesn’t behave the way I expected.

Does anyone know why this might happen,
or if there’s a good explanation or documentation for how these drag-and-drop scheduling options are supposed to work especially for forward and backward scheduling.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Set Work Order duration on Maintenance Plan
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm having trouble understanding Maintenance Plans.

Here's what I need:

I'm trying to create a Maintenance Plan that cycles every three years. I need a Work Order to be generated halfway through the cycle. This Work Order should remain open throughout the second half of the cycle, allowing for flexible completion. Here's an example:

  • April 8, 2025: Start of the cycle.
  • 1.5 years later (October 8, 2026): Work Order created with Scheduled Start: October 8, 2026, and Scheduled End: April 8, 2028.
  • 1.5 years later (April 8, 2028): End of the cycle and start of a new one. The Work Order should be completed by this time.

What I've done:

I set up a Maintenance Plan with a three-year cycle and a 50% Call Horizon. The Work Order is generated on October 8, 2026, as intended, but the Scheduled Start and Scheduled End are both set to April 8, 2028, which is not what I need.

I hope this explanation is clear. Thank you for your time!

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Supplier enablement
entry.content:
The supplier enablement is not a feature but a process or activity, during the supplier enablement process the supplier management team can engage supplier to use Ariba, it does not require addtional license.

And regarding your requirement, you can define question (e.g. Main group, Sub group) in the Internal Supplier Request or External Supplier Registration template and mark it as search term.

More details you can view the link: https://help.sap.com/docs/strategic-sourcing/supplier-management-setup-and-administration/questions-as-search-filters

entry.title: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

how can a SaaS provider deliver a SAP custom theme (created with UI Theme Designer in Provider Subaccount) to the SaaS application of the subscriber.

The solution which is possible at the moment:
Develop a Launchpad Module in the CAP Project and integrate the theme designer to it. This allows to use a custom theme created by the customer/subscriber. But themes from provider are not selectable.

Documentation for creating a launchpad module:
Create a Multitarget Application and Add Modules | SAP Help Portal

Documentation for using theme designer in launchpad module:
Creating Custom Themes | SAP Help Portal

UI theme designer SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: Re: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please provide odata service in following format in 'Resource Path' - /sap/opu/odata/sap/OData Service Name

Also in your destination you didn't add location id for on premise destination, can you please add that and try again.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 adoption becoming more universal
entry.content:
I just wonder why all apps documented in Fiori Apps library are the ones done using SAPUI5. Isn't there standard app for S/4HANA that is using it? I understand it being used in other products.

 

Going forward you will be able to use Web Components seamlessly also in SAPUI5 apps, i.e. with the SAPUI5 programming model.

That would be interesting. What are the use cases for that?

entry.title: Re: How to Add Custom Button in BP Application ToolBar

HI @shankar2552000

entry.title: Does switching from exactly once to at least once semantics have a peformance impact in PI
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to improve the performance in terms of messages processed a secound in PI by scaling up.

i.e increase the number of nodes, threads, parallism of the REST and Kafka adapter involved.

I was wondering if the Exactly Once Semantics in PI generates more load compared to At Least Once Semantics.

Does anyone have any view/experience on performance and use of system resources of these PI Semantics.

regards

Angelo

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content:
@AustinKloske 

The annotation for dynamically hiding a header facet is as follows:

  {
    hidden: #('editActionIsEnabled'),
    label: 'Credit Limit Consumption',
    id: 'CreditLimitChartHeader',
    targetQualifier: 'CreditLimitChart',
    targetElement: '_CREDITLIMITDETAILS',
    type: #CHART_REFERENCE,
    purpose: #HEADER
  }

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/ca00ee45fe344a73998f482cb2e669bb

Last year, we needed to pass through the web assessment but with the recent changes, i'm not sure it's always necessary.

Thank you

Regards

Hi SAP Code Jam ,

We are Ready to host SAP Code Jam Event in Infosys Hyderabad for below topics 
Location : Infosys Hyderabad STP ,Gachibowli , Hyderabad ,Telangana - 500032

  • SAP ABAP RAP BTP
  • SAP BTP CAPM 
  • SAP BUILD 
  • SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION 
  • SAP INTEGRATION SUITE 
    SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Integration Suite SAP CodeJam SAP Build Apps SAP Community


Thanks & Regards
Sweekar Machireddypally 
SAP Technical Consultant 

 

 

  •

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
@ronald_fassl1 it's hard to say what the root cause is, maybe you face an error where the payload can't be retrieved before writing into the dead letter queue, but this can't really happen unless the payload is already empty in the first JMS queue because the payload is saved right at the beginning of the flow, what was the error in the first place? Or the payload comes empty in from the XI inbound processing flow so it might be related to the new XI adapter setting handled by integration flow, there were some issues in the past and a patch has been provided. Are you on the latest version of the XI inbound? It should be 1.0.4. You may update to 1.0.4 and redeploy or revert to 1.0.2 where we do not use the handled by integration flow setting and run some tests, best is to raise an incident ticket, if this is related to the XI adapter then on the support component LOD-HCI-PI-CON-SOAP

Alex

Neven

entry.title: BOM versioning in cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

I hope this mail finds you well,

 

We have a client requirement stating, when we try to amend the existing bill of material the system should automatically create a version of BOM to that alternate.

 

I have checked for any workaround but able to find that column in "Maintain Bill of material" but i required that to be enabled while doing amendment.

 

Please suggest us how we can achieve this automation.

 

looking forward for your valuable feedback.

 

Thanks & regards,

 

Salman.

entry.content:

In IAS we didn't change anything and it's working well with SSO SBN with both configurations. The problem was with the notifications sent to the buyer from the platform. With the configuration of @ondrej_pandoscak the link from the notifications was not working, with mine it was all good. For that reason I made the comment here.

entry.title: Recruiting: Download attachments of candidates in new workbench
entry.content:
Hello😊

unfortunalty you can not dowload the additional attachments of a candidate in the new workbench when you use "download documents".

Only the resume and the cover letter are shown for the download (see pics). You can see the additional attachements in the cadidate profile in  "resume and documents" in the category additional documents. Please see picture. Can we change this? Its convenient when we can dowload all documents at once.

Many thanks in advance.

Kind regards,

Olga

more attachements are available

only resume and cover letter

entry.title: Re: In the mobile app I can't see a selection of multiple...
entry.content:
As of now, only CV is supported on the mobile app. An enhancement request for this functionality already exists.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/52081/?section=sectionDetails

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Failed to load the logic canvas
entry.content:
Hi fellow builders,

I am facing weird issue since last few days. I am using trial account and followed these steps:

1 - I have created a SAP Build Apps - visual cloud functions by selecting Application Backend.

2 - I created one data entity - Customer with following attributes. Saved and deployed successfully:


 3 - I am trying to create a function, saved it and no issues so far.

4 - When I click on + and create record and select customer entity as below. Any idea why it is happening? Thanks in advance

The following error occurs and the editor crashes and not allowing me to proceed. 

Regards

Abhi

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add new condition tables for condit...
entry.content:
Hi,

to add new condition table You need to:

  • Create new condition table (copy of standard one) and adopt fields
  • Add this table to access sequence (or create new access sequence and add this new table)
  • if new access sequence You need to edit parameter in condition type (assign new access sequence).

Hope this solve Your problem

Best Regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Custom Value Help Creation For a Particular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
Hi Basant,

Thank you. It's a useful blog. If we are using this field as a selction field, after selection of value 'New'(say), the filtering will not match to the lower case values successfully right?  Please share the trick if it's working.

entry.title: Re: Leverage Input parameters from CDS in Datasphere
entry.content: Hi @puneetc, Parameterized CDS views are not supported yet. But it has been mentioned in the roadmap that this feature is planned for Q2 2025. So we can expect this feature soon.

entry.title: Value Help for Input Parameter Field in Fiori Elements List Report + CAP
entry.content:
I'm trying to add value help for input parameters in a Fiori Elements List Report using OData V2 or V4 (I tried both, but without success). I need to use input parameters because my data comes from a parameterized view in the HANA database. For service/backend I'm using the CAP framework.

Getting both input parameters and properties to appear in the filter bar was already quite challenging. I only managed to get it working with OData V2.

Adding value help to the regular filter bar fields (based on entity properties) works fine, but I can't get it to work for input parameters.

Is there any known solution for this? Or maybe an example project on GitHub that shows how to implement value help for input parameters?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX we a...
entry.content: We need a solution the reason Why is known now. We need to understand how to solve this

entry.title: Re: Year end revenue adjustment automatically in Public c...
entry.content: Thank you so much..This really help.

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content: Can you elaborate more please? Are you saying your current number is coming in below or above the SAP number that they "think" you should have?

entry.title: Re: Timesheet Approval BADI SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi, 

maybe this post will help You. https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_override-the-default-approval-processdocx-activity-7303295192982249474-ApNU

More information You can find in help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0bebd08dffca45afa67b1f751199afd0/9040795315ae4b1f898788a18460d7d3.html?version=2408.500#badi%E2%80%99s-%28business-add-in's%29

in sap note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3495575

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Access value of badi parameter 'Type Ref to'
entry.content:
@ThorstenKaendler  If the parameter RE_POS_MAN_PROC was EXPORTING, the you would call the method as follows:

im_position->get_pos_man_proc( 
  importing
    RE_POS_MAN_PROC = proc
).

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP Build Process Automation – CK40N Task...
entry.content:
Hi,

you can do the following

  • Capture the full element as grid view control as shown below
  • Then in automation use "Click Cell (GUI Grid)" activity, Input parameter as following 
    • rowNumber - number of the row you want to click
    • columnKey - Column Key

    •

entry.title: Re: No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX we a...
entry.content: If you are sure the account is correct, then you need to modify the account settings in FS00 and remove automatic only postings flag.

entry.title: Re: Decimal place in a calculated field in SAC
entry.content:
@egil63 

If they are defined as story calculation, you might have to setup the formatting option for each calculation.

You will find the option in the calculation as shown 

If they are defined at model level you can set the scale for each calculated account/measures in the model itself.

Set your format and untick the checkbox.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Portal launchpad site: cdm.js not found
entry.content: Hello, for better understanding it would be helpful to have the full URL, which returns 404. In our case 404 was returned before the version of UI5 specified in CDM was out of support and was removed from ui5.sap.com

entry.title: SAP EWM and Loftware Integration – Documentation and Setup Guidance
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m currently working on integrating SAP EWM with Loftware for label printing, and I’m looking for any guidance or documentation related to this integration.

Your suggestions or references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Seshu

entry.title: Re: How to capture the Network logs during a PunchOut session to view the data sent by the Supplier.
entry.content: Thanks for the informative sharing!

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content: Genau das wollte ich damit sagen: Ich komme bei meiner Auswertung auf 4 Developer, während SAP von 9 Developer-Lizenzen ausgeht. Ich bin mir außerdem nicht sicher, welche Profile oder Berechtigungsobjekte genau zur Einstufung als Developer führen. Ich habe bereits einen Benutzervergleich durchgeführt und festgestellt, dass bei den 4 betreffenden Usern sowohl das Profil SAP_ALL als auch das Berechtigungsobjekt S_A.DEVELOP vorhanden ist. Wenn ich allerdings eine gezielte Suche mit komplexeren Kriterien durchführe – z. B. in der Tabelle UST04 mit dem Suchparameter Profil: S_A.DEVELOP – dann erhalte ich nur einen einzigen Benutzer als Ergebnis. Laut der SAP-Lizenzvermessung haben wir jedoch 9 Developer im System. Daher bin ich etwas unsicher, wie genau diese Einstufung zustande kommt.

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: OK. Sorry. No need for the Xerces stuff. It is just that that control implements an XML lookup. So forget everything I said about that. On this development machine with the 64 bit runtime, the DLLs are at C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64 and win32_86. Is the built-in editor for Visual Studio 32 or 64 bits? Ie do I need to have both 32 and 64 bit versions of the DLL even if the app is 64 bits? Once I get the project sorted, then I will try opening it in VS2022 and then send it to you.

entry.title: Fiori Elements - How to detect navigation and read routing parameters in a custom page (controller)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using UI5 version 1.120.x. The app includes a ListReport and an ObjectPage. I've now added a third view using a custom page based on the Flexible Programming Model. The new view is called Employee, and its controller extends from sap/fe/core/PageController.

I’m trying to figure out two things:

  1. How can I detect when the navigation to this custom page has occurred?

  2. How can I read optional routing parameters that might have been passed during navigation?

I noticed that when using a Controller Extension, it's possible to override certain lifecycle methods like onBeforeBinding or onAfterBinding, as shown here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/controllerExtensions/routingExtensibility

However, this approach doesn’t seem to work for view controllers that inherit directly from sap/fe/core/PageController. Is there an equivalent or recommended way to hook into the navigation lifecycle for such custom pages?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: When testing PunchOut Catalogue, items are not being Added to Cart?
entry.content:
Hi @ProMatt ,

Sorry for the late response, did you get the chance to solve the issue?

I was asking the issue occurs in WooCommece or SAP Ariba side, if the issue happens in SAP Ariba, then the cxml payload sent from WooCommece need to be checked.

If the issue happened in WooCommerce, I would suggest to check with WooCommerce support team first, maybe they can find some log from backend to analyze further.

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Re: Standalone As-Built Configuration in SAP ME - Excess...
entry.content:
Hi!

You can activate BusinessServiceExecutionInterceptor log (see Note 3082957) to find out if the GUI of As-Built Config calls any PAPI on Remove action. If no PAPI is called (so it is the old code not using PAPI), then you can submit a request to MFG-ME-API component so that Support team can consider possibility of implementing a missing feature.

You can also try the same but with As-Built Config Tabular, which might be different from the standard (legacy, non-tabular) activity that you are using on the screenshot.

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hi,

if I have understood correctly, support for sap bw 7.5 on hana will still end at the end of 2030, even though you migrate from sap bw to sap bw PCE and then to BDC?

entry.title: Re: Status update in S4 HANA not happening during Enginee...
entry.content:
Hi!

 

I guess Engineering orders are not supported for integration out of the box. Please check the SAPMEINT How-To Guide and the online help, available at help.sap.com/me. If they do not state explicitly that it is supported, then it implies the opposite.

 

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: Re: OAuth request is failing in CPI using standard integr...
entry.content: From the attached screenshot it's not clear what type of Authorization you used. Please check this help page: Testing a Connection from SAP Commerce Cloud to SCI using an OAuth Token. As you can see first you need to do a POST request to obtain Bearer token and then use it in GET request with X-CSRF-Token set to Fetch in order to obtain CSRF token. After that both Bearer and CSRF can be used to do the POST request.

entry.title: Re: Download Material Document xml
entry.content:
Hi,

please check this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3120595/E

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Adding parameters to FLP URL for all users client-wide
entry.content: did you google fiori launchpad configuration?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for April – SAP Build 👷‍♀️🏠
entry.content: I finally completed it.

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content: I saw that in the documentation but it was unclear how to implement it using ABAP cds annotations. I think that 'editActionIsEnabled' refers to a xml property defined as Edm.Boolean. (https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/blob/a5a6a14936119a90905d73d4dfacbf8672d09e93/packages/odata-service-inquirer/test/unit/prompts/test-data/metadataV4WithAggregateTransforms.xml#L701). I created this post to hopefully get a solution that works as a ABAP CDS annotation. If it requires js or xml based development that will be done in BAS / outside of our ABAP system so be it. Hopefully as RAP and clean core add-ons become more popular more functionality becomes available through ABAP cds annotations.

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content: deleted.

entry.title: Re: Decimal place in a calculated field in SAC
entry.content: Hi Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Service with Advanced Execution in SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
@sambtr 

Hello,

Please use the concept of stock transfer item in service order: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c9b5e9de6e674fb99fff88d72c352291/d5d9ce7c695a4cffbdcd6684dba2c6ca.html?q=stock+transfer 

Thanks and Kind Regards, Abhishek
